name: Round Down
definition: A rule to always round down when dividing or multiplying numbers
full_text: Whenever you divide or multiply a number in the game, round down if you end up with a fraction, even if the fraction is one-half or greater. Some rules make an exception and tell you to round up.

mechanics.rule: Round down for any fraction (including 0.5 or greater)
mechanics.exceptions: Rules explicitly stating to round up
